testcase.name: runScenario["Search for a product and add it to the cart", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](1)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Search for a product and add it to the cart # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:3 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 132665 bytes]
When the user searches for "14.1-inch Laptop" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userSearchesForProduct(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 103950 bytes]
And clicks on the product from the search results # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clicksOnProduct()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 157038 bytes]
And clicks the "Add to Cart" button # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clicksAddToCart(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 157226 bytes]
Then the product should be successfully added to the cart # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyProductInCart()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 162355 bytes]
testcase.system-err: Jul 07, 2026 12:15:55 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 150 Jul 07, 2026 12:15:55 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 150.0.7871.46. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Checkout Process with Invalid Data Handling", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](2)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Checkout Process with Invalid Data Handling # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:10 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 137289 bytes]
And the user has a product inside the shopping cart # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.addDefaultProductToCart()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 277394 bytes]
When the user opens the shopping cart # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.openShoppingCart()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 113439 bytes]
And checks terms of service and clicks checkout # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepCheckout()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 111931 bytes]
And selects checkout as guest option # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepGuest()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 84089 bytes]
And attempts to continue billing with empty required fields # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepInvalidBilling()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 86307 bytes]
Then a billing validation error message should appear # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepVerifyValidationError()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 93649 bytes]
When the user enters valid checkout billing data # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepValidBilling()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 100388 bytes]
And completes all remaining checkout steps # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepCompleteCheckout()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 68991 bytes]
Then the order confirmation message "Your order has been successfully processed!" should be displayed # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepVerifyOrder(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 67073 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["User Registration with Invalid Data Handling", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](3)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: User Registration with Invalid Data Handling # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:22 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 143250 bytes]
When the user navigates to the Registration page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToRegistrationForm()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 93855 bytes]
And attempts to register with missing required data fields # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.submitEmptyRegistrationForm()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 100438 bytes]
Then a registration form field validation error should appear # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyRegistrationFieldError()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 100456 bytes]
When the user registers with valid unique customer credentials # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.enterValidRegistrationData()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 85351 bytes]
Then the registration confirmation message "Your registration completed" should be displayed # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyRegistrationSuccessMessage(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 85351 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with Valid & Invalid Credentials", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](4)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Login with Valid & Invalid Credentials # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:30 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 146643 bytes]
When the user navigates to the Login page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToLoginForm()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 112176 bytes]
And attempts to log in with invalid customer credentials # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.loginWithInvalidData()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 115855 bytes]
Then a login validation error message should be displayed # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyLoginError()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 117299 bytes]
When the user enters the valid credentials of the registered account # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.loginWithValidData()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 137528 bytes]
Then the "My account" email link should be displayed at the top # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyMyAccountHeaderLink(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 138470 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Data Driven Login Validation", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](5)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario Outline: Data Driven Login Validation # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:46 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 137528 bytes]
When the user navigates to the Login page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToLoginForm()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 112176 bytes]
Row_01 Login Status = false And authenticates using credentials ID "Row_01" out of the excel sheet # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.authenticateUsingExcelRowCredentials(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 116977 bytes]
Login Result Recorded Then the login result should be captured # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.loginResultCaptured()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 116977 bytes]
Excel Updated Successfully => Row_01 : FAILED Excel Updated : Row_01 -> FAILED

testcase.name: runScenario["Adding Multiple Products to Cart & Validating Cart Summary", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](11)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Adding Multiple Products to Cart & Validating Cart Summary # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:53 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 134236 bytes]
When the user searches for "Computer" items and adds "Build your own cheap computer" to cart # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.searchAndAddMultipleProducts(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 289215 bytes]
And the user searches for "Computer" items and adds "Simple Computer" to cart # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.searchAndAddMultipleProducts(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 275735 bytes]
And navigating to the checkout shopping cart page view # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToCartSummaryView()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 112192 bytes]
Then the cart summary totals grid should display correct items and price calculations # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyCartSummaryTotalsGrid()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 112192 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Perform Check-out with Coupon Discount Verification", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](12)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Perform Check-out with Coupon Discount Verification # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:60 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 147149 bytes]
When the user navigates to a product details page view and adds an item to cart # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.loadDirectProductDetailsView()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 288135 bytes]
And navigates back to the cart page to apply coupon code "test_coupon" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.applyInstructorCouponCode(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 94513 bytes]
Coupon validation processing container status state: false Then the cart summary should reflect the applied discount calculation # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyCartSummaryReflectsCouponDiscount()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 112192 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Logging Out and Verifying Session End", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](13)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Logging Out and Verifying Session End # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:66 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 153244 bytes]
When the user ensures they are logged in with valid credentials # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.ensureUserIsAuthenticatedForLogoutScenario()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 154197 bytes]
Logout link not visible on screen. Clearing session storage and cookies directly via WebDriver API. And clicks the logout button from the account navigation links # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clicksLogoutButtonFromAccountLinks()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 197147 bytes]
Then the user should be logged out and redirected to the home landing page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyUserIsLoggedOutSuccessfully()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 134973 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Forgot Password Password Recovery Process", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](14)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Forgot Password Password Recovery Process # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:72 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 133995 bytes]
When the user navigates to the Login page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToLoginForm()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 112176 bytes]
And clicks on the "Forgot password?" hyperlink # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userClicksForgotPasswordLink(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 89743 bytes]
And enters the registered account email address to recover password # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.enterRegisteredEmailForRecovery()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 96505 bytes]
And clicks the recovery submission button # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clickPasswordRecoverySubmission()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 98065 bytes]
Then a notification message "Email with instructions has been sent to you." should be displayed # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyPasswordRecoveryNotification(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 98065 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Update Shopping Cart Quantity Controls and Product Removal", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](15)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Update Shopping Cart Quantity Controls and Product Removal # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:80 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 134095 bytes]
When the user searches for "14.1-inch Laptop" items inside the store catalogue # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userSearchesForProductScenario9(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 103950 bytes]
And clicks on the product link to open the product details page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userOpensProductDetailsPageScenario9()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 162355 bytes]
And clicks the "Add to Cart" button # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clicksAddToCart(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 178476 bytes]
And navigates to the shopping cart workbench page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToCartWorkbench()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 106522 bytes]
And changes the product quantity field value to "3" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.changeProductQuantity(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 106710 bytes]
And clicks the update action button # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clickUpdateCartButton()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 106130 bytes]
Then the cart total should reflect the updated quantity calculations # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyUpdatedQuantityCalculations()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 106130 bytes]
When the user checks the remove selection box for the product # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.selectRemoveItemCheckbox()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 106332 bytes]
And clicks the update action button again # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clickUpdateCartBtnAgain()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 65211 bytes]
Then the product should be completely removed and the cart should display "Your Shopping Cart is empty!" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyProductRemovalAndEmptyCart(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 67459 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Wishlist Operations for Authenticated Users", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](16)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Wishlist Operations for Authenticated Users # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:93 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 137870 bytes]
When the user logs into their active account if not already authenticated # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.ensureAuthenticatedSessionForWishlist()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 138692 bytes]
And searches for "Health Book" and navigates to its product details page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.searchAndOpenProductDetailsForWishlist(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 236722 bytes]
And clicks the Add to Wishlist action button # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clickWishlistBtnOnDetailsPage()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 240700 bytes]
And navigates to the Wishlist storage page view # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToWishlistPortalView()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 91963 bytes]
Then the product should be successfully visible inside the wishlist table # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyProductVisibleInsideWishlistTable()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 91963 bytes]
When the user checks the remove checkbox next to the product item # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.performWishlistRemovalSelection()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 56528 bytes]
And clicks the Update Wishlist button # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.submitUpdateWishlistFormActions()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 56528 bytes]
Then the wishlist page should update and display "The wishlist is empty!" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyWishlistIsEmpty(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 56528 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Product Comparison Engine Operations", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](17)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Product Comparison Engine Operations # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:104 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 141153 bytes]
When the user searches for "Computer" items and opens "Build your own cheap computer" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.searchAndOpenProductForComparison(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 271311 bytes]
And clicks the Add to Comparison List action button # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clickComparisonButtonOnDetailsPage()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 122895 bytes]
And the user searches for "Computer" items and opens "Simple Computer" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.searchAndOpenProductForComparison(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 267127 bytes]
And clicks the Add to Comparison List action button again # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clickComparisonButtonOnSecondDetailsPage()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 155278 bytes]
Then the product comparison table grid should display both computer products successfully # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyComparisonGridProducts()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 155278 bytes]
